seoTitle: Maalan vs Mabuiag Island — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Maalan and Mabuiag Island. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Maalan vs Mabuiag Island: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Maalan and Mabuiag Island.
heading: Maalan vs Mabuiag Island — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Maalan, Queensland and Mabuiag Island, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mabuiag Island has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Maalan (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Maalan or Mabuiag Island safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Maalan has a flood risk score of 43/100, while Mabuiag Island scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Maalan scores 48/100 for bushfire risk. Mabuiag Island scores 40/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Maalan or Mabuiag Island?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mabuiag Island has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
